name: Yakitori
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon grated ginger root, thinly sliced
5 ounces skinned and boned chicken breast, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small stainless-steel or glass mixing bowl, combine sherry, canned chicken broth, Teriyaki sauce, minced garlic, and grated ginger. Mix well.
2. Add the chicken pieces and livers to the marinade and toss to coat evenly.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
4. On each of four 12-inch wooden or metal skewers, thread the ingredients in this order: starting and ending with a mushroom cap, alternating with 1/2 of the chicken pieces, 1/4 of the livers, and 1/4 of the scallions.
5. Remove and discard the garlic and ginger from the marinade, reserving it for brushing the skewers during cooking.
6. Place the skewers on a nonstick baking sheet and broil 4 to 5 inches from the heat source. Turn once and brush frequently with marinade until the livers are browned and firm and the chicken is tender, about 2 to 3 minutes per side.
7. Arrange the skewers on a serving plate and brush or pour any remaining pan drippings over them.
